canonical_answer: At 0s, white text overlays arranged fruit pieces including strawberries and grapes on a white surface; at 8s, assembled skewers resembling hats appear with green grapes nearby on the table; at 14s, a package of thin wooden sticks lies on a dark textured surface.

question: Describe the arrangement and components of the fruit kabobs as they are presented in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, red strawberries and green grapes rest on a white surface background initially; at 2s, strawberries are cut into cone shapes resembling Santa hats clearly; at 8s, banana slices and marshmallows appear as brims and pom-poms on skewers.
